name: jStat

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of hand-written formulas when you need pdf/cdf/quantiles/sampling or parameter-sweep curves for distributions beyond the normal distribution, because native AI implementations fail on cumulative probabilities and inverse functions for t, F, Gamma, and Beta distributions.
en.why_valuable: AI can write a normal pdf somewhat reliably by default but often gets cdf, inv, and parameter order wrong for t/F/Gamma/Beta; jStat provides reproducible values through one consistent distribution API.

data_in.note: The input maps to jStat[distribution][operation](input, ...params); params must follow the native signature order and must not be mixed with named parameters.

schema.x?: number -- input for pdf/cdf, omitted by default; required for those two operations
schema.p?: number -- 0..1 probability for inv, omitted by default; required when operation='inv'

when_to_use: 需要正态以外的 pdf/cdf/分位数/抽样或参数变化曲线时用它而非手写,因为原生 AI 在 t、F、Gamma、Beta 分布的累计概率和反函数上会失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能较稳定写出正态 pdf,对 t/F/Gamma/Beta 的 cdf、inv 和参数顺序经常出错；jStat 用同一分布 API 给出可复算数值。

data_in.note: 输入映射到 jStat[distribution][operation](input, ...params)；params 必须按原生签名排序,不混用命名参数。

schema.x?: number —— pdf/cdf 的输入,默认省略；这两种 operation 时必填
schema.p?: number —— inv 的 0..1 概率,默认省略；operation='inv' 时必填

provides._note: headless-primitive:不直接渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵；纯 JS 数值层。
provides.outputs: pdf/cdf/inv/mean/variance 的标量,或 sample 的随机样本；按一组 x 迭代可产出 [x,y][] 曲线。

peer.note: 本条只产数值；把多点计算得到的 [x,y][] 交给折线/面积图组件,参数滑杆由消费 AI 自行接线。

boot.note: 分布名和 operation 应按 schema 白名单取值；不要把用户字符串直接当属性链执行。

isolation.evidence: Pure numeric JS: jStat[dist][op](...) returns scalars/samples with zero DOM, style, event, or window access. Headless math layer, runs identically in any context including inside a shadow root.
